item.name: Mosquito Fish
item.description:
This inhabitant of Downripple was once utilized as a means of natural pest control.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: Historically, this wavekin was introduced to various locales as a means of pest control─a cunning way of leveraging its enduring appetite for infuriating insects. To this day, populations still inhabit the waterways of Tuliyollal itself.
